data.description: BOJ MINUTES: SOME MEMBERS SAID RATE-HIKE TIMING MUST CONSIDER IMPACT OF A WEAK YEN ON UNDERLYING INFLATION; ONE MEMBER SAID GOVERNMENT STIMULUS WILL BOOST GROWTH OVER THE NEXT 1–2 YEARS.

BOJ MINUTES: MANY MEMBERS SAID INFLATION IS SOMEWHAT OVERSHOOTING OCTOBER PROJECTIONS; ONE MEMBER SAID RECENT FOOD PRICE GAINS REFLECT NOT ONLY ONE-OFF SUPPLY FACTORS BUT HIGHER LABOUR AND DISTRIBUTION COSTS.
ORACLE: WEATHER-RELATED DATA CENTRE POWER OUTAGE TEMPORARILY DISRUPTED TIKTOK SERVICES; ORACLE AND TIKTOK WORKING TO RESOLVE U.S. USER ISSUES.
MOTIVA PORT ARTHUR TEXAS REFINERY: LARGE COKER MALFUNCTIONED MONDAY NIGHT – FILING.

data.title: Bitcoin appears to be entering a more stable phase as liquidity support remains strong and investors favor hedging over leverage, according to Coinbase and Glassnode.
data.description: Recent data analysis indicates that the Bitcoin market is experiencing more stability, with liquidity support remaining strong. This shift is accompanied by investors leaning towards hedging strategies rather than leveraging. This shift comes as a relief to many in the market, with Bitcoin seeing more consistent numbers and potentially a decrease in volatility.
EURO SLIPS 0.2% TO $1.20135 AFTER 1.3% SURGE PREVIOUS SESSION.
BOJ MINUTES: MEMBERS AGREED MONETARY CONDITIONS WOULD REMAIN ACCOMMODATIVE EVEN IF RATES ARE RAISED AT THIS MEETING.
BOJ MINUTES: ONE MEMBER SAID IT IS APPROPRIATE TO ADJUST MONETARY SUPPORT AS JAPAN’S REAL POLICY RATE IS EXTREMELY LOW BY GLOBAL STANDARDS.
BOJ MINUTES: ONE MEMBER WARNED PROLONGED DEVIATION OF REAL RATES FROM EQUILIBRIUM COULD HURT LONG-TERM GROWTH.
BOJ MINUTES: A FEW MEMBERS SAID REAL INTEREST RATES WOULD REMAIN DEEPLY NEGATIVE EVEN IF BOJ RAISES RATES TO 0.75%.

BOJ MINUTES: ONE MEMBER SAID BOJ MUST WEIGH PROS AND CONS OF RATE HIKES AND THEIR IMPACT ON HOUSEHOLDS AND CONSUMPTION; MEMBERS AGREED RATES WILL LIKELY KEEP RISING IF ECONOMIC AND PRICE PROJECTIONS MATERIALISE.
BOJ MINUTES: ONE MEMBER SAID BOJ SHOULD ASSESS VARIOUS FACTORS, INCLUDING SURVEYS, TO JUDGE WHETHER MODERATE WAGE AND INFLATION GAINS ARE BECOMING EMBEDDED IN JAPAN’S ECONOMY.

BOJ MINUTES: SOME MEMBERS SAID ADJUSTING MONETARY SUPPORT WOULD HELP STABILISE MARKETS AND BENEFIT THE ECONOMY; MOST SAID BOJ SHOULD AVOID PRESETTING THE PACE OF RATE HIKES AND ASSESS ECONOMY, PRICES AND MARKETS AT EACH MEETING.
ORACLE: U.S. TIKTOK USER “CHALLENGES” DUE TO TECHNICAL ISSUES FOLLOWING POWER OUTAGE.

BOJ MINUTES: ONE MEMBER SAID RISK PREMIUM IS DRIVING LONG-TERM RATE VOLATILITY AND WARRANTS VIGILANCE; ANOTHER SAID A TIMELY RATE HIKE WOULD HELP CURB FUTURE INFLATION PRESSURES AND LONG-TERM RATE RISES.

data.title: Arthur D. Little appoints new leaders in Asia, strengthening regional presence and commitment.
data.description: Arthur D. Little recently revealed new leadership appointments in Asia, displaying their dedication to the region. This move showcases the company's emphasis on strengthening its presence in Asia. The specific number of new appointments was not disclosed.

data.title: Safe2core Inc celebrates 16 years as a national leader in hydro excavation, SUE Level A, and subsurface engineering services.
data.description: A company based in San Jose, California, known as Safe2core Inc, which offers nationwide hydro excavation services, Subsurface Utility Engineering (SUE Level A), and non-destructive subsurface investigation, shared the celebration of its 16th anniversary on January 27, 2026. Safe2core Inc has been in operation for over 16 years, providing specialized services to clients across the country.

BLACKROCK CUTS AROUND 10 PRIVATE CREDIT EXECUTIVES AS IT INTEGRATES ITS $12 BILLION HPS ACQUISITION, INCLUDING SENIOR STAFF HIRED BEFORE THE DEAL, SIGNALING A SHAKE-UP OF ITS PRIVATE FINANCING BUSINESS.
BOJ DECEMBER MINUTES: ONE MEMBER SAID DELAYING ANOTHER MEETING TO RAISE RATES WOULD BE RISKY GIVEN FX IMPACT ON INFLATION.
OIL PRICES HELD NEAR A FOUR-MONTH HIGH AS A WEAKER U.S. DOLLAR AND RISING IRAN-RELATED GEOPOLITICAL RISKS KEPT CRUDE SUPPORTED.
